item.title: Traders protest new customs tariffs as Iraq wrestles with shrinking oil revenues
item.description: Hundreds of traders and customs clearance company owners have protested in central Baghdad to demand that Iraq's government reverse new customs tariff...

item.title: Hims & Hers drops plan for knockoff of Novo Nordisk's new Wegovy weight loss pill
item.description: Telehealth company Hims & Hers dropped its plan to offer a knockoff version of the weight-loss pill Wegovy on Saturday — two days after it announced t...

item.title: Italian police fire tear gas as protesters clash near Olympics hockey venue
item.description: They used tear gas and water cannon on protesters near a Winter Olympics venue.

item.title: Trump praises Nexstar-Tegna broadcast television deal he once opposed
item.description: President Donald Trump on Saturday endorsed Nexstar Media Group’s $6.2 billion purchase of broadcast rival Tegna, an apparent reversal from earlier cr...

item.title: India and US release framework for an interim trade agreement
item.description: Under the deal, tariffs on goods from India would be lowered to 18%, from 25%.
